|desc={{p|Mr. Rime}} is Melony's first known Pokémon. When his ice cane broke, Mr. Rime went into a depressive state and refused to leave his Poké Ball. Melony lent him to {{Henry}}, hoping he could use his Tool Meister skills to repair it. Once the repairs were made, Melony allowed Henry to keep him. He is housed in an [[Ultra Ball]].

None of Mr. Rime's moves are known and his Ability is {{a|Screen Cleaner}}.}}
